summary: Nice recording of an energetic yet lackluster performance.
review: The show is described as having plenty of energy but ultimately falling short of its potential, resulting in a mixed musical impression. The recording itself is praised as "nice," suggesting decent clarity and listenability despite the limited detail on source type.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate (3‑star) review; it notes a decent recording but an underwhelming performance, leading to an overall average rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls the recording "nice," implying acceptable clarity and balance despite no specifics on source.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Performance described as energetic but lacking overall impact, suggesting a mixed‑quality show.
